metadata.description: Agent skills distilled from non-fiction books. Each book is an installable plugin.

plugins.name: fundamentals-of-software-architecture
plugins.description: 19 architecture skills from Fundamentals of Software Architecture by Mark Richards & Neal Ford

plugins.name: design-patterns-gof
plugins.description: 15 design pattern skills from Design Patterns: Elements of Reusable Object-Oriented Software

plugins.name: the-mom-test
plugins.description: 9 customer discovery skills from The Mom Test by Rob Fitzpatrick

plugins.name: influence-psychology-of-persuasion
plugins.description: 10 persuasion skills from Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion by Robert B. Cialdini

plugins.name: designing-data-intensive-applications
plugins.description: 14 data systems skills from Designing Data-Intensive Applications by Martin Kleppmann

plugins.name: the-craft-of-research
plugins.description: 12 research methodology skills from The Craft of Research, Fourth Edition by Wayne C. Booth, Gregory G. Colomb, Joseph M. Williams, Joseph Bizup, and William T. FitzGerald

plugins.name: the-1-page-marketing-plan
plugins.description: 13 direct response marketing skills from The 1-Page Marketing Plan by Allan Dib

plugins.name: hacking-growth
plugins.description: 11 growth skills from Hacking Growth by Sean Ellis and Morgan Brown — PMF gating, ICE prioritization, channel selection, funnel diagnosis, retention, monetization, and stall prevention

plugins.name: traction
plugins.description: 13 startup growth skills from Traction by Gabriel Weinberg and Justin Mares — Bullseye channel selection, phase strategy, channel testing, critical path planning, and 9 deep-dive acquisition channels (viral, PR, SEM, SEO, content+email, engineering-as-marketing, sales, BD, existing platforms)
